examples.name: matchmaker
examples.title: Matchmaker
examples.blurb: Three loci wired through the typed bus: a Lobby publishes players onto a queue topic, the Matchmaker counts joins and publishes a match, a MatchLog prints it. The whole pub/sub chain runs as WebAssembly in your browser.

examples.name: sim
examples.title: Live lobby (paced)
examples.blurb: Same idea, animated: an @export locus whose frame() the page drives ~60×/sec. Players trickle in over real time and matches start live — press Run, watch it tick, press Stop. State lives in the locus and persists across frames.
